title: ROOTS - circular policies for changing the biowaste system
subtitle: POSITION PAPER
description: A position paper by the ROOTS Initiative outlining policy recommendations to overcome regulatory barriers and promote a circular bioeconomy through urban biowaste valorisation. It presents targeted actions at European, national, regional, and local levels covering waste prevention, recycling targets, end-of-waste status, and innovative valorisation pathways such as biopesticides, insect feed, and single cell protein.
